title: ScalingResult
description: Schema for the result of fitting a power-law scaling model to convergence time data.

analysis_id.description: Unique identifier for this scaling analysis run.

topology.description: Topology type this result applies to.

network_id.description: Identifier of the specific network instance.

epsilon_c.description: Detected critical threshold (epsilon_c) for this network.

fit_parameters.description: Parameters from the power-law fit T = A * (epsilon - epsilon_c)^(-gamma).

fit_quality.description: Metrics describing the quality of the fit.

data_points_used.description: Number of (epsilon, T) points used in the fit.
